scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix encounters/backend && npm install --prefix encounters/frontend && npm install --prefix orders/backend && npm install --prefix orders/frontend && npm install --prefix intake-form/with-wizlo/backend && npm install --prefix intake-form/with-wizlo/frontend && npm install --prefix intake-form/without-wizlo/backend && npm install --prefix intake-form/without-wizlo/frontend && npm install --prefix payment/with-wizlo/backend && npm install --prefix payment/with-wizlo/frontend && npm install --prefix payment/without-wizlo/backend && npm install --prefix payment/without-wizlo/frontend && npm install --prefix subscriptions/1-plan-management/backend && npm install --prefix subscriptions/1-plan-management/frontend && npm install --prefix subscriptions/2-enrollment/backend && npm install --prefix subscriptions/2-enrollment/frontend && npm install --prefix subscriptions/3-lifecycle-management/backend && npm install --prefix subscriptions/3-lifecycle-management/frontend && npm install --prefix subscriptions/4-autopay/backend && npm install --prefix subscriptions/4-autopay/frontend && npm install --prefix subscriptions/5-patient-portal/backend && npm install --prefix subscriptions/5-patient-portal/frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "enc-api,enc-web,ord-api,ord-web,intf-wiz-api,intf-wiz-web,intf-loc-api,intf-loc-web,pay-wiz-api,pay-wiz-web,pay-loc-api,pay-loc-web,sub1-api,sub1-web,sub2-api,sub2-web,sub3-api,sub3-web,sub4-api,sub4-web,sub5-api,sub5-web" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan,green,greenBright,yellow,yellowBright,magenta,magentaBright,red,redBright,white,gray,bgBlue,bgCyan,bgGreen,bgYellow,bgMagenta,bgRed,bgWhite,bgBlackBright,blue.bold,cyan.bold" "npm run dev --prefix encounters/backend" "npm run dev --prefix encounters/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix orders/backend" "npm run dev --prefix orders/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix intake-form/with-wizlo/backend" "npm run dev --prefix intake-form/with-wizlo/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix intake-form/without-wizlo/backend" "npm run dev --prefix intake-form/without-wizlo/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix payment/with-wizlo/backend" "npm run dev --prefix payment/with-wizlo/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix payment/without-wizlo/backend" "npm run dev --prefix payment/without-wizlo/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix subscriptions/1-plan-management/backend" "npm run dev --prefix subscriptions/1-plan-management/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix subscriptions/2-enrollment/backend" "npm run dev --prefix subscriptions/2-enrollment/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix subscriptions/3-lifecycle-management/backend" "npm run dev --prefix subscriptions/3-lifecycle-management/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix subscriptions/4-autopay/backend" "npm run dev --prefix subscriptions/4-autopay/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix subscriptions/5-patient-portal/backend" "npm run dev --prefix subscriptions/5-patient-portal/frontend"
